sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_atanh (value Float64, result Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY value;
UPDATE test_atanh SET result = atanh(value) WHERE value BETWEEN -0.5 AND 0.5;
SELECT value, result FROM test_atanh WHERE result IS NOT NULL;
SELECT value, atanh(value) AS computed_result FROM test_atanh WHERE value > 0;
